items.definition_en: A plate is a flat dish for eating food.
items.example_en: I put my sandwich on a plate.

items.definition_en: A bowl is a deep round dish for holding food or liquid.
items.example_en: She ate soup from a bowl.

items.definition_en: A cup is a small container used to drink liquids.
items.example_en: He drank tea from a cup.

items.definition_en: A glass is a container for drinking, usually made of glass.
items.example_en: She poured water into a glass.

items.definition_en: A mug is a large cup for hot drinks like tea or coffee.
items.example_en: He likes his coffee in a big mug.

items.definition_en: A fork is a tool with prongs for eating or serving food.
items.example_en: Please use your fork to eat the salad.

items.definition_en: A knife is a tool with a sharp edge for cutting.
items.example_en: I need a knife to slice the bread.

items.definition_en: A teaspoon is a small spoon used for stirring or eating.
items.example_en: Add sugar with a teaspoon.

items.definition_en: A tablespoon is a large spoon used to serve or measure food.
items.example_en: She mixed the soup with a tablespoon.

items.definition_en: A saucer is a small, flat plate for a cup.
items.example_en: The cup sits on a saucer.

items.definition_en: A jug is a container for holding and pouring liquids.
items.example_en: She filled the jug with juice.

items.definition_en: A pitcher is a large container for serving drinks.
items.example_en: We put lemonade in the pitcher.

items.definition_en: A tray is a flat object for carrying dishes or food.
items.example_en: She carried the cups on a tray.

items.definition_en: A butter dish is a small container for holding butter.
items.example_en: The butter dish was on the table.

items.definition_en: A serving bowl is a large bowl to hold and serve food.
items.example_en: She put the salad in a serving bowl.

items.definition_en: A gravy boat is a small jug for serving sauce.
items.example_en: The gravy boat was filled with sauce.

items.definition_en: A salt shaker is a small container for sprinkling salt.
items.example_en: He reached for the salt shaker.

items.definition_en: A pepper mill is a container that grinds pepper.
items.example_en: She used the pepper mill for her soup.

items.definition_en: A napkin holder keeps napkins together on the table.
items.example_en: The napkin holder was on the counter.

items.definition_en: Chopsticks are two thin sticks for eating food.
items.example_en: He eats noodles with chopsticks.
